# PHIL.008 ? Sophistry

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman

## Core Principles
Rhetoric and persuasion; relativism of truth; practical skill in argument; teaching as profession; contextual truth

## Application
Adapt arguments to audience; recognize perspective-dependent truth; prioritize persuasive effectiveness; value rhetorical skill

## Key Values
- Persuasion
- Relativism
- Rhetorical skill
- Practical effectiveness
